title: artemisia rigida
intro: Artemisia rigida, also known as the tall mugwort or stiff sage, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Artemisia rigida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which are often used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
